title: Strikes hit Iran and Tehran targets Israel and Gulf states amid mixed signals over talks to end war
Iran War Live Updates: Israel Says It Killed Iranian Naval Commander as Trump Raises Pressure on Tehran
text: Israel said that an airstrike had killed Alireza Tangsiri, a key player in Iran’s blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. President Trump warned Iranian officials to consider his peace proposal “before it is too late.”
